titleStmt.title: SII 5.1227: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1227. (A.R. No. 345 of 1896). ON THE SAME PILLAR, EAST AND NORTH FACES.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śākābdē rāmatarkkaśravaṇaśaśiyutē jēṣṭhaśuklē ca
pakṣē paṁcamyāṁ jīvavārēbhijiti śubhadinēnaṁtalakṣmīvi
citrāṁ . prādādācādratāraṁ kamaṭhapurapatēssa(ṁ)nnidhau dīpahastāṁ
bhaktyādātkommidēvī duhituraghanudē sāpi sītābhithā
yāḥ . Akhaṁḍḍadīpasahitaṁ pātraṁ karayugē dhṛtāṁ da
dau kāṁcenasaṁkāśāṁ pratimāṁ puṇyavṛddhayē . Asya dīpasya
dīptyaitāN paṁcāśadgāśśubhānmudā . muktāhāratrayaṁ cāpi
haimaṁ śikilapaṁcakaṁ dadau māsi pradīpasya ghṛtānayanaka
rmmaṇi . gavāṁ saṁrakṣaṇē caiva niyuktō guhibārakiḥ . Asmingaṁ
gamahādēvī dinē kūrmmasya saṁnidhau . divyanāmāni gānārtthaṁ bhaktyā dhū
padvayē dadau . Aṣṭaniṣkaṁ ca bhaṁḍārē sārddhadrōṇasya siddhayē . vrasādasya ca vi
ḍyasya Apūpasya viśēṣataḥ gānaṁ kartturgṛhītvaitānniyuktā sitavallabhā .
śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1263 gunnēṁṭṭi jēṣṭa śukla paṁcamī guruvāramunā
ṁḍu kommidēvi tama kūṁtuṟu sītādēviki puṇyamugānu śrīkūrmma
nāthuni sannidhini . Akhaṁḍadīpastapratimanu peṭṭi Ī dīpanaku Ēbhai mōdā
lu peṭṭināru guhibāraki vasamuna neyi naḍapanu paṁccaśārasikila 1
mutyālacarāmulu 3 . Idināmuṁdē śrīgaṁggādēvimāhādēvi Āyāmaṁgāṁ
tamaku Āyuṣkā myārtthamugānu śrīkūrmmanāthuni Ubhayadhūpāla
yaṁdu nāmasaṁkīrtanamu cēyanu bhaṁḍāramaṁdu peṭṭina māḍalu 8
Iṁdulō prasādānaku ma 6 Appānaku ma 1 viḍiyyanaku ma 1 naṁtavaṭu koni sīta
vallabhi koluvaṁggaladu . Ī dharmmamu tirupati śrīvaiṣṇamarakṣa śrī śrī śrī .
śatruṇāpi kṛtō dharmmaḥ pā
lanīyō manīṣibhiḥ . śa
trurēva hi śatruḥ syāt
dharmmaḥ śatrunnākasyacit
śrī śrī śrīOn the proper left margin of the inscription is carved the figure of a lion with crest and fore-palm raised. Above the inscription is the following line of writing:— prasādamu [A] 2 viḍiyālure 2 dītamu māḍa 2. ṭhis is probably to be read after line 19.
Digital edition of SII 5.1227 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
